steps.text: Go to console.cloud.google.com and open or create a project.
Search for 'Gmail API' and click Enable.
Click Create Credentials → OAuth client ID.
Set Application type to Web application.
Under Authorized redirect URIs add: http://localhost:8080/api/auth/callback (replace with your server's address if not running locally).
Click Create, then Download JSON — this is your client_secret.json.
Add your email address as a test user.

notes.text: The redirect URI must exactly match what you enter in Google Cloud Console. If you access Expensor on a non-default port or hostname, set BASE_URL in your docker-compose.yml and use that URL here.
Running on a homeserver without a public domain? Choose Desktop app instead of Web application — then use the manual URL paste flow on the authorize screen.
Only gmail.readonly is required. Expensor never modifies your inbox.
